locale.snippet: try { const c = await cookies(); locale = c.get('locale')?.value || 'fr'; } catch {}

movie.snippet: case "Movie": return { label: tc('movie'), color: "bg-blue-500/20 text-blue-400 border-blue-500/30", icon: Film };

settings.restoreOk.snippet: if (res.ok) { setAutoBackupMsg({ type: "success", text: t('restoreOk') }); setTimeout(() => window.location.reload(), 3000); }

settings.deleted.snippet: if (res.ok) { setAutoBackupMsg({ type: "success", text: t('deleted') }); setAutoBackups(prev => prev.filter(b => b.name !== backup.name)); }

common.error.snippet: setTaskStatus(prev => ({ ...prev, [taskKey]: { loading: false, msg: { type: "error", text: data.error || data.message || tc('error') } } }));
} else { setAutoBackupMsg({ type: "error", text: data.error || tc('error') }); }
else { setAutoBackupMsg({ type: "error", text: data.error || tc('error') }); }
else { setAutoBackupMsg({ type: "error", text: data.error || tc('error') }); }

common.success.snippet: setTaskStatus(prev => ({ ...prev, [taskKey]: { loading: false, msg: { type: "success", text: data.message || tc('success') } } }));
